patch:
--- a/multiplexer_8bit.v
+++ b/multiplexer_8bit.v
@@ -1,10 +1,10 @@
 module multiplexer_8bit(
   input [7:0] data_a,
   input [7:0] data_b,
   input sel,
   output [7:0] result
 );
 
-  always @(data_a) begin
+  always @(data_a or data_b or sel) begin
     if (sel)
       result <= data_b;
     else
       result <= data_a;
   end
 endmodule
